item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 2min Impressive Diablo gives Ryan quick double irishracing.com Impressive Diablo gives Ry
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 2min Impressive Diablo gives Ryan quick double irishracing.com Impressive Diablo gives Ryan quick double John Ryan bagged a quick double at Clonmel this evening when Le Diablo ran out an easy winner of the Botanica International Handicap Hurdle at odds of 33/1. 48

item.title:

"The Mexicans could be cheering home one of
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min NEW EPISODE: The Sweet Spot with @sbk
"The Mexicans could be cheering home one of their own on Sunday"
Steve Palmer tells us his 18-1 next-best selection at LIV Mexico
Watch here: https:// youtu.be/T3g8oI0sp7g
18+ #GambleAware 1 940

item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 12min Ryan's Gaffer another to make all at Clonmel irishracing.com Ryan's Gaffer another
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 12min Ryan's Gaffer another to make all at Clonmel irishracing.com Ryan's Gaffer another to make all at Clonmel My Gaffer made it a hat-trick for front-runners at Clonmel today when landing the Killusty Handicap Hurdle for trainer John Ryan. 161
